Mark Joseph Romeo, Esq. representing Plaintiff Bipin Kapadia.
No appearances made by Defendants.

Bifurcated hearing from Feb-20-2024.

Plaintiff and witness excused by the Court.

The Court reviews and makes a record of the amounts indicated in the proposed order submitted.

The proposed judgment comports to proof and the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants as follows:

Defendant Kinney Hotel LLC $74,901.70
Defendant BJH Investments, LLC $35,009.28
Defendant Karma & Dharma Investments, LLC $91,340.95
Shivaa Investments, LLC $28,771.40

For a total judgment of $309,222.33

Hansaben Patel
Hitesh Patel
Reena Patel
Bhavesh Patel

Proposed order signed and executed this day.
